message:
test: add wiremock mock server for integration tests

- Add wiremock dependency for HTTP mocking in tests
- Add mock_server module with structured mock server utilities
- Support GitHub API mocking for bundle tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
